commands.cmd: render Nutrition and Pantry active tasks and inspect scoped git ownership

summary: Stopped before editing because active Pantry Worker T009 also owns docs/data-model.md, inside T016's allowed files. Protected migrations and journal remain externally dirty; no files were changed and verification was not started.
